heading: Freight vessels
label: 8901 Freight vessels
text: A freight vessel of less than 100 gross tons as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under shall be operated by an individual licensed by the Secretary to operate that type of vessel in the particular geographic area, under prescribed regulations.section 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)890146:390bSection 8901 requires that a freight vessel of less than 100 gross tons be operated by a licensed individual for that type vessel and for a particular geographic area.

Amendments1996— inserted “as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under ” after “100 gross tons”.Pub. L. 104–324section 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this title
